---
title: "A Neural Net Solves the Three-Body Problem"
description: "A hybrid scheme — Brutus does the heavy lifting, the neural network steps in when the computational burden becomes too great."
author: "synesis"
date: "2019-10-26"
categories: [deep learning, science, mathematics, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![A neural net solves the three-body problem. Image from [MIT Technology Review](https://www.technologyreview.com/s/614597/a-neural-net-solves-the-three-body-problem-100-million-times-faster/amp/).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

"So their vision is to create a hybrid system. In this case, Brutus will do all the heavy lifting, but when the computational burden becomes too great, the neural network will step in until it becomes acceptable again."


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_a-neural-net-solves-the-three-body-problem-activity-6593918025588715520-T8rZ).*
